title: Letter from Camp
text:
## Letter from Camp

Dear {person},

Camp is {adjective} so far. Our cabin is near the {place}, and every morning we {past-tense verb} before breakfast.

**Yesterday:** Our counselor taught us to {verb} properly, which was harder than it looked.

**Last night:** We sat around the fire and told stories about {animal}s and old {place}s. My tentmate brought a {object} from home and swears it brings good luck.

**Food:** Lunch was {adjective}, dinner was better, and someone hid a {object} in the salad bowl.

**Please write back soon.** Tell me whether the {place} is still quiet and whether the {animal} next door has learned any new tricks.

Missing you,
{person}
